overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban street. The player character crosses a street, passes a GUN-O-MAT vending machine, and continues along a sidewalk lined with futuristic buildings and digital billboards.

turning right at the corner near the GUN-O-MAT machine

futuristic weapon vending machine with bright red neon signage reading GUN-O-MAT
tall metal pole with pedestrian signal displaying green walk symbol
multi-story commercial building with illuminated windows and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban intersection at night. The player walks across a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a brightly lit GUN-O-MAT vending machine glowing with red neon. The traffic light pole shows a green walk signal as the player approaches the corner and begins to turn right onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to industrial building with traffic barrier

events.description: turning onto sidewalk alongside building with black and yellow hazard stripes
futuristic orange car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to a striped industrial building, with the street and passing traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: orange futuristic sedan driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: building exterior with diagonal black and yellow hazard warning stripes
orange metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the street
tall building covered with multiple large illuminated digital advertisements
tall street lamp casting bright white light onto the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player turns onto a narrow sidewalk running alongside a building with distinctive black and yellow hazard stripes. An orange metal traffic barrier separates the walkway from the street where a futuristic orange car drives past. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from a massive digital billboard tower visible ahead, while a bright street lamp illuminates the scene from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with pedestrian traffic and neon-lit building entrance

events.description: pedestrians appear walking ahead on the sidewalk
passing building entrance illuminated with teal neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, approaching and passing pedestrians, passing a building entrance featuring teal neon lights on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking in the same direction ahead of the player
blue futuristic sports car driving along the street

entered.detail: doorway with bright teal cyan neon lighting and glass doors

segments.scene_description: As the player continues walking, pedestrians appear ahead on the sidewalk walking in the same direction. The striped industrial building gives way to a commercial entrance bathed in teal neon light. A blue futuristic car drives past on the right while the massive digital billboard tower looms larger in the center view, and the orange traffic railing continues alongside the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk under a green walk signal, moving toward the red glow of a GUN-O-MAT vending machine at the corner. As the camera turns right onto the sidewalk, the environment shifts to a narrow walkway bordered by a black and yellow hazard-striped building and an orange metal traffic barrier, while a futuristic orange car glides past on the wet street. The scene then expands as the industrial stripes give way to a commercial entrance bathed in teal neon, with pedestrians appearing ahead and a blue car passing by. Finally, the perspective pushes forward as a massive digital billboard tower looms larger in the center view, reflecting vibrant colors across the damp concrete.
